Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: A151
Thirst for Life

Triggers: When the unit health drops below 35%

Power of the Seven Suns
The unit removes all debuffs and steals 40% of the max health from the enemy with the highest current health for 5 sec. Also, the artifact owner starts incinerating that enemy for 5 sec. The enemy takes 44800 pure damage every second for 5 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated unit take pure damage equal to 65% of the damage taken by the original target. When the incineration wears off, the targets of the ability are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, as well as physical and magic armor are reduced by 35% for 3 sec. The artifact owner restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝

Event:

Event date:

Sage bot code: A151

First trigger: When the unit health drops below 35%
